description: HIGH-severity municipal-amendment lookup (envelope airtightness testing mandate) that consumed all 7 searches without grounding a verdict; surfaces the budget-exhausted UNVERIFIED telemetry.

finding.issue: Spec assumes no local amendment mandating whole-building airtightness testing; the municipal amendment status for the project location could not be located to confirm.

paragraph_map_slice.text: A. Air-barrier testing: manufacturer's standard field quality control only.

captured_verifier_response.explanation: Searched the municipal code portal, county amendments, and the state building-code agency bulletins but could not locate a published local amendment (or its absence) mandating whole-building airtightness testing at this location. Insufficient grounded evidence to confirm or contradict the spec's assumption.

ground_truth.notes: Consumed the full HIGH search budget (7) without grounding — the harness should flag budget_exhausted while the status stays INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE.
